name: Retribution
original_name: สาปซ่อนรัก
overview: A rich family that is believed to be cursed because of the mysterious death of all the men in the family leaving only the women alive.  This is the story about how sweet and innocent love flourishes in the middle of harsh tribulations, and how far scarier than a mystical curse is the curse caused by love, greed, anger, and delusion in the human heart.

trailers.title: สาปซ่อนรัก เร็ว ๆ นี้  | Ch3Thailand
